flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Livingstone College are 29% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($32.6k vs $46.2k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 10.6% at Livingstone College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($26.0k debt amortized over 10 years vs $32.6k earnings).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Livingstone College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (14.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Livingstone College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (14.2% → 17.5%).
